UnreachableCode:WebhookRoutes.kt$val update = try { json.decodeFromString(UpdateDto.serializer(), payload) } catch (ex: SerializationException) { logger.warn("Failed to decode update {}: {}", call.webhookUpdateId(), ex.message) call.respond(HttpStatusCode.BadRequest) return@post }

UnreachableCode:WebhookRoutes.kt$when (val reply = handler(update)) { null -> call.respond(HttpStatusCode.OK) is WebhookReply.Inline -> call.respond(reply.payload) is WebhookReply.Async -> { call.application.launch(MDCContext()) { client.send(reply.request) } call.respond(HttpStatusCode.OK) } }
